content.en:
The value of the Primordial Void Gold Stone is so high, although it is gone after refining, it is a one-time treasure, but it has great value to the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and it is one of the treasures that they all urgently need.

If you really comprehend the Extreme Dao of the Extreme Realm, then your strength will really skyrocket, and your life-saving ability will be greatly improved!

Especially for those who have comprehended the Extreme Time Extreme Realm, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers are even more eager to obtain the Primordial Void Golden Stone.

Therefore, the value of the Primordial Void Golden Stone is much higher than the value of the Thunder Pole Dao Monument.

Soon, a Realm Perfect Controller began to make offers, wanting to compete for the Primordial Void Golden Stone.

Those weak Extreme Dao creatures didn't dare to mix, after all, this was not a treasure they could have, even if there were really a lot of Extreme Dao coins on their bodies, they didn't dare to compete, otherwise they would be looking for death!

Time passed slowly, and just as he was about to determine who would be able to obtain this primordial gold stone, a majestic figure appeared.

"One billion Extreme Dao Coins, this Primordial Empty Gold Stone, I want it!"

The figure said.

At this time, many extreme creatures saw him.

"Meet the Lord of Darkness!"

One of the Extreme Dao creatures said respectfully.

The Lord of Darkness is the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm achieved by the Dark Serpent, and his bloodline is extremely powerful, and his strength is also very good among the Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Realm.

At this time.

Ye Tian also noticed the Lord of Darkness and immediately spied it with his copying talent.

"Hey, this Lord of Darkness also has an Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment - Dark Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, yes, it's copied!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The Lord of Darkness bid for one billion Extreme Dao Coins, and other Extreme Dao creatures can't afford to increase the price, and they don't dare to increase the price!

In this way, this primordial empty golden stone belongs to the Lord of Darkness.

The Lord of Darkness directly dropped a billion Extreme Dao Coins, and then took the original empty gold stone.

In the next moment, an incomparably terrifying will descended, and after a glance, he left.

Obviously, the masters of these wills were all Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, but it was a pity that they were one step late.

After the original empty gold stone transaction is completed, this sale will end.

One by one, the Extreme Dao creatures left, and the Lord of Razor took these Extreme Dao Coins to the nearest Extreme Dao Deep Sea Temple, and deposited these Extreme Dao Coins in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Temple, and in the name of his bloodline descendant.

......

The end of the world, the origin of the sea.

"Hahaha, this time I participated in the sale of the Lord of Thunder, and I gained a lot, two Extreme Dao Ancestors, and I saw the Thunder Extreme Dao Monument and the Original Empty Golden Stone. With my ability to copy everything, I can copy the Thunder Pole Dao Monument, but I can only copy one item, and I am still copying the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, if I copy either of these two items, I will not be able to copy the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass. "

Ye Tian hesitated.

He thought about it carefully, and first continued to copy the Extreme Mangbai Grass again and again, and hit the Extreme Dao of Light in the Extreme Realm.

After the comprehension of the Extreme Dao of Light is completed, then go to the Extreme Dao of Thunder, and after comprehending the Extreme Dao of Thunder completely, then go to copy the original Void Golden Stone and impact the Extreme Path of the Extreme Realm.

Subsequently, Ye Tian fused the Yin and Yang Pole Dao Ancestral Fu and the Dark Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, and the number of his own Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu increased by two.

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to comprehend a kind of extreme way.

The poles of yin, yang, and darkness are also included in the ranks of enlightenment.

Of course, Ye Tian's most important thing is to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Light.

However, it is really too difficult to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Light to the extreme realm.

After all, he was only using the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass to comprehend, not refining the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass.

If those Extreme Mangs White Grass were real, if he refined them one by one, he would have already comprehended the Extreme Dao of Light in the Extreme Realm.

"The extreme light power contained in the Extreme Mango White Grass, I wasted too much when I contemplated it, I had to make reasonable use of it, if I created a secret technique that was used efficiently, then the speed of my contemplation would be much faster. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, in the following years, he began to try to create in this way, although he would waste a lot of Miscanthus White Grass and a lot of time, but once the enlightenment was successful, everything was made up, and it would be of great help in the future.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of millions of eternal years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created a secret technique, the Extreme Light Vibration Technique, through which he could re-shake the extreme light power that had escaped during his enlightenment, and provide him with continued enlightenment.

With the Extreme Mang Light Shock Technique, Ye Tian Ginseng realized that the efficiency of the Extreme Mangbai Grass had increased several times at once.

The years passed, and more than 10 billion eternal years passed.

99% Success

This is the Extreme Dao of Light realm that Ye Tian felt, and he was only one step away from comprehending the Extreme Dao of Light at the extreme level, as if he could comprehend the Extreme Dao of Light at the extreme level at any time.

"It's about to break through, once it breaks through, it's another world!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he continued to work hard to attain enlightenment.

A long time passed, and finally the shackles in the dark were broken by him.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian comprehended the extreme path of light, and his perception seemed to have stepped into another level, and he could perceive an incomparably distant place with the power of the extreme path of light.

Moreover, he sensed the end of the depths of endless time and space—the primordial Black Sea.

In an instant, Ye Tian stepped into the primordial black sea.

"Come in!"

Ye Tian didn't expect that he would enter the Primordial Black Sea so easily, and at the beginning, with the most powerful top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique, he only touched the Primordial Black Sea and saw a black area.

But now that he has comprehended the Extreme Light Path, he can step into the Primordial Black Sea at any time.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled in the Primordial Black Sea, although the speed was not fast, every step he took in the Primordial Black Sea was equivalent to crossing the area of the infinite territory of the Boundary.

A few minutes later, a wave of repulsion came.

"No, I can't stay in the Primordial Black Sea anymore!"

Ye Tian realized this and left the Primordial Black Sea directly.

Back at the end of the realm, he found himself far from the area he had previously had.

"Sure enough, the speed of traveling in the Primordial Black Sea will be very fast, even if I rush from the Origin Realm Sea to the Eternal Ruins, I will only need a few minutes to be able to arrive!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, he can step into the Primordial Black Sea at any time, even if he really encounters the attack of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, he escapes into the Primordial Black Sea, as long as the other party can't enter, he can easily escape.

"Hahaha, you can go anywhere in the future!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course, he wouldn't be arrogant enough to really provoke the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, if he really angered an existence who had comprehended the Extreme Extreme, he still couldn't escape, and if someone locked him with the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, he would be in trouble, and maybe all the replica bodies and ontologies would be found.

If you find the Origin Realm Sea, it will be completely finished.

He may not die, but the Origin Sea will definitely be destroyed.

Therefore, he still had to hold steady and not deliberately provoke those Extreme Perfect Controllers.

"Extreme Mangs White Grass is useless to me, let's complete the cultivation of the Thunder Extreme Dao, and then go to the extreme space Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian planned.
